sql.mssql: INSERT INTO THGQMGPRIO (CODPRIO, DESCRICAO, PRAZODIAS, ATIVO) SELECT 1, 'Simples', 30, 'S' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM THGQMGPRIO WHERE CODPRIO = 1)
sql.oracle: INSERT INTO THGQMGPRIO (CODPRIO, DESCRICAO, PRAZODIAS, ATIVO) SELECT 1, 'Simples', 30, 'S' FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM THGQMGPRIO WHERE CODPRIO = 1)

sql.mssql: INSERT INTO THGQMGPRIO (CODPRIO, DESCRICAO, PRAZODIAS, ATIVO) SELECT 2, 'Prioritario', 15, 'S' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM THGQMGPRIO WHERE CODPRIO = 2)
sql.oracle: INSERT INTO THGQMGPRIO (CODPRIO, DESCRICAO, PRAZODIAS, ATIVO) SELECT 2, 'Prioritario', 15, 'S' FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM THGQMGPRIO WHERE CODPRIO = 2)

sql.mssql: INSERT INTO THGQMGPRIO (CODPRIO, DESCRICAO, PRAZODIAS, ATIVO) SELECT 3, 'Critico', 5, 'S' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM THGQMGPRIO WHERE CODPRIO = 3)
sql.oracle: INSERT INTO THGQMGPRIO (CODPRIO, DESCRICAO, PRAZODIAS, ATIVO) SELECT 3, 'Critico', 5, 'S' FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM THGQMGPRIO WHERE CODPRIO = 3)
